prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L Busso V6 (6V) (engine code: AR01648) with forged internals including JE Pistons 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a balanced crankshaft by VAC Motorsports for 8,500 RPM reliability. Paired with a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile for high-lift, long-duration performance.

Forced Induction: Custom-built turbo system using a Garrett GT35R turbocharger with a Tial 44mm external wastegate, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Autodelta Revival, and a Spearco front-mount intercooler with 3.5-inch piping. Boost set to 12 PSI with a custom Motec M800 ECU managing fuel and ignition timing for 320+ HP at the wheels.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (DFV) with adjustable camber plates, polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part no. SPF0115K) for the front control arms, and a custom-fabricated 25mm rear sway bar by Hotchkis. Braking upgraded to Brembo GT 330mm front rotors with 4-piston calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Body Kit: Custom Autodelta Revival widebody conversion with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Painted in Alfa Rosso Competizione with matte black accents and clear bra film by XPEL on high-impact areas.
Wheels: 17x9 ET20 OZ Racing Ultraleggera wheels in silver with 225/45/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Custom center caps with Alfa Romeo Quadrifoglio badges.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum shift knob by Autodelta Revival. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching, and a digital dash upgrade using an Aim MXS Strada display.
